violations.text: Allergen awareness statement not present on menu boards. PIC to add allergen awareness statement to all menus. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1.bakery coolers 2.shelves in kitchen 3.food storage bins have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The floors in the walk in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
